top_findings.summary: This audit skill requests Bash execution permissions which could allow arbitrary system operations (file deletion, network access, privilege escalation) far beyond its stated purpose of performing static code analysis and architectural review. The skill's description emphasizes "zero-code" analysis and forbids writing code, yet requires the ability to execute arbitrary shell commands via Bash, creating a significant security mismatch. While Read/Grep/Glob tools are appropriate for code review, Bash access is excessive and could enable actions completely unrelated to the audit's purpose.
